meta.title: About Us | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Learn about Prayaan Capital's mission to empower MSMEs with transparent, accessible credit across South India.

sections.headline: Built for Bharat's Businesses
sections.subheadline: Our mission is simple — make formal credit accessible to every MSME, no matter the size or location.

sections.headline: Our Story
sections.body: Prayaan Capital was founded in 2018 with a single conviction: the MSME segment in semi-urban South India was creditworthy but underserved. Traditional banks demanded collateral and documentation that small business owners simply could not provide. We built an NBFC that combines relationship banking with technology to bridge this gap.

sections.headline: Mission & Vision
sections.body:
Mission: To be the most trusted lender for micro and small enterprises in South India, delivering credit that is fast, fair, and genuinely supportive of business growth.

Vision: A South India where every MSME owner — regardless of scale, gender, or location — has access to formal credit on transparent terms.

bullets.title: Transparency
bullets.body: No hidden fees. No surprise charges. Every term explained clearly.

bullets.title: Respect
bullets.body: Every borrower is treated with dignity, regardless of loan size.

bullets.title: Reliability
bullets.body: Consistent policies and dependable service across all branches.

bullets.title: Innovation
bullets.body: Technology that serves people, not the other way around.

bullets.title: Inclusion
bullets.body: Active focus on women entrepreneurs and first-time borrowers.

milestones.title: Founded
milestones.body: Prayaan Capital incorporated in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

milestones.title: RBI Registration
milestones.body: Received NBFC certificate of registration from RBI.

milestones.title: First 1,000 Loans
milestones.body: Crossed 1,000 loan disbursals despite pandemic headwinds.

milestones.title: Expansion to AP & TG
milestones.body: Opened operations in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.

milestones.title: Tech Platform Launch
milestones.body: Launched AI-native underwriting and digital KYC platform.

milestones.title: ₹500 Cr+ Disbursed
milestones.body: Crossed ₹500 Crore in cumulative loan disbursals.

sections.headline: Join the Prayaan Capital Story
sections.subheadline: Whether you're a borrower, investor, or partner — we'd love to connect.
